last_run_summary.note: Board dormant. 1 session archived (Blurry NanoPolix - card done in Trello).

notes.api_gotcha: REST API /sessions/{id}/prompt returns 404. Must use MCP tool agor_sessions_prompt with short IDs.
notes.trello_comments: mcp__trello has no add-comment tool. All sessions must use curl with creds from ~/.config/mcp-trello.env
notes.session_pagination: agor_sessions_list only returns 100 of 448 total sessions. Use agor_sessions_get for individual verification.
notes.dead_sessions: 7 sessions confirmed gone: 245675aa (creat website), 888aacdd (ארנונה), e6b2c709 (תיקון פין מקרר), 544d1804 (Led light strip), 2e691145 (Japan museum), 85337ae4 (Dishwasher), 63d0cd60 (התקנת אינטרנט)
notes.uuid_gotcha: When processing updates: always read full session UUIDs from the actions file or DuckDB. Never manually construct or truncate UUIDs - the suffix matters. The generate script correctly reads from DuckDB; the orchestrator must read from the generated actions file too.
